title: Countered's Smooth F5
description: A mod that smooths out the third person view making it more cinematic
body:
**Countered's Smooth F5** A mod that smooths out the third person camera view to make it more cinematic! ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a4f4917c5fb1c7acef5ace4e5294fd0839edc8.gif) *** **Features** * Improves the camera by letting it follow the player * Smoother F5 transitions * Config for personal camera settings (1.21.11) *** **Planned:** * More camera features *** **Follow Countered for updates!** Stay up to date with the latest news, updates, and upcoming features for "Countered's Smooth F5" by following me on social media:

* **Twitter (X):** [https://twitter.com/RealCountered](https://twitter.com/RealCountered) * **Discord:** [https://discord.gg/wANx8YbzDs](https://discord.gg/wANx8YbzDs) * **YouTube:** [https://www.youtube.com/@realCountered](https://www.youtube.com/@realCountered/) * **Bluesky:** [https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social) * **GitHub:** https://github.com/Coun7ered/smooth_f5 * **Donate via PayPal:** [https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted\_button\_id=M6JCVGPEDKKDS](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=M6JCVGPEDKKDS) **Feedback and Support** I would love to hear your feedback on the mod! If you have suggestions, bug reports, or just want to share your experience, please create an issue on the CurseForge page or DM me on X.
